tools.name: analyze
tools.description: AI analysis on any topic — market, technology, trend, company. Returns concise analysis with key findings, opportunities, and risks.

tools.name: dd_report
tools.description: Generate AI due diligence report on a company or topic. Tiers: basic (4 sections), standard (6 sections), premium (7 sections + multi-model consensus).

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Ask any research question. Routed to the best LLM provider based on question type (coding, Chinese, speed, general).

tools.name: market_intel
tools.description: Multi-model market intelligence. Queries 3+ LLMs in parallel for consensus analysis on a market question.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get TSUNG AI system status — provider count, health, capabilities.

tools.name: hunt
tools.description: Trigger AI intelligence hunt — scans 13 sources (HuggingFace, GitHub, ArXiv, Reddit, etc.) for latest AI developments.

tools.name: ghost_write
tools.description: Create a Ghost research task. AI will process it in background and return results.

tools.name: ghost_status
tools.description: Check Ghost task status — pending, completed, unread results.

tools.name: compound_search
tools.description: Search TSUNG knowledge base (compound rules + insights). Returns matching rules.

tools.name: demand_radar
tools.description: Check demand radar — top hiring signals and freelance opportunities.

tools.name: line_push
tools.description: Send a LINE message to the owner via TSUNG1 bot.
